basic_details.job_title: Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation Tihidi CRP-EP Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation Tihidi
basic_details.short_information: The Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation Tihidi has released the official CRP-EP Notification 2026 on 04 May 2026 at the official platform. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the CRP-EP Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a qualification of 10th Pass and currently working as CRP-CM in Tihidi Block (women candidates only) can apply offline from 05 May 2026 to 19 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Working as CRP-CM in Tihidi Block, Women, Able to read and write Odia, Resident of Tihidi Block
qualification.details: 10th Pass Working as CRP-CM in Tihidi Block Women Able to read and write Odia Resident of Tihidi Block

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation Tihidi CRP-EP Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:bhadrak.odisha.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CRP-EP posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CRP-EP posts is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the CRP-EP posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the CRP-EP posts is 18 years. There is no upper age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the CRP-EP position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the CRP-EP position is Rs. 1000 per month. This is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for the CRP-EP role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard, be currently working as CRP-CM in Tihidi Block, be women, able to read and write Odia, and be a resident of Tihidi Block.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the CRP-EP post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies available for the CRP-EP post in Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation Tihidi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CRP-EP posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CRP-EP posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CRP-EP recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on eligibility criteria, academic qualifications, experience, and socio-economic and special category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the CRP-EP position?
faq.answer: The job type for the CRP-EP position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Which block is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is specifically for the Tihidi Block under the Alok Jyoti Block Level Federation.
